description: Thirty authored anchor stars. The first eight form a straight tier spine spaced 10 sectors apart with a small up/down wobble. Existing nearby anchors are moved near their matching tier pockets. Ten new local stars are added around Tier 1 for the first playable region. Existing authored planets remain parented to their anchor stars.

tier_1_anchor_star_planet_01.scan_description: Authored anchor planet 1 orbiting Tier 1 Star.
tier_1_anchor_star_planet_01.contact_text: Orbital contact available. This is an authored anchor planet.
